title: hypericum majus
intro: Hypericum majus, also known as Large St. John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and red berries. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum majus include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and promote wound healing. Hypericum majus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
